news.title: What are the implications of a renewed closure of the Strait of Hormuz?
news.description: Investing.com -- A prolonged closure of the Strait of Hormuz could send Brent crude to $150 a barrel, revive inflation and force major central banks to raise interest rates despite slowing economic growth, Capital Economics said in a recent note.

news.title: Chevron (CVX) Cuts 9,000 Jobs As Record Oil Output Reshapes Its Workforce
news.description: Chevron (NYSE:CVX) is cutting 9,000 jobs even as it reports record oil production. The company cites increased automation and changing investor priorities as key drivers of the move. The restructuring focuses on reducing costs and reshaping Chevron’s global workforce.
